title: Pithecoctenium elongatum
taxonomy: Pithecoctenium elongatum is classified within the plant family Apocynaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It belongs to the genus Pithecoctenium, which is a small group of evergreen trees or shrubs. Pithecoctenium elongatum is further classified as a member of the Apocynaceae family, which includes a diverse range of plants. The classification of Pithecoctenium elongatum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Apocynaceae family.
